title: Smoky Crunchy Croatian Vegetables Stir-fry
description: A diabetic-friendly sick-day dish featuring crispy vegetables infused with a smoky flavor and black pepper for added crunch and depth of taste.

ingredients.name: 1 bell pepper (any color)
ingredients.notes: Seed and chop into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup low-sodium soy sauce (optional)
ingredients.notes: For added flavor, not necessary for diabetes-friendly version

instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced zucchini and bell pepper to the skillet. Season with black pepper.
After about 5 minutes until they start to soften slightly, add garlic and cherry tomatoes.
Stir-fry for another minute until everything is heated through and fragrant.
Remove from heat and serve hot as a snack or light meal.
